picks.title: Trump scraps threat of 20% fee on Hormuz cargo as US resumes blockade of Iran ports
picks.summary: One day after vowing to charge cargo ships a 20% toll for using the Strait of Hormuz, Trump abandoned the plan as US Central Command reimposed a naval blockade on ships entering and leaving Iranian ports. The reversal, amid continued tit-for-tat strikes, is being read as a sign Washington is struggling to force an end to its war with Iran and to break Tehran's grip on the waterway.
flags: Active US-Iran war; both sides' claims are contested

picks.title: 'God is punishing the politicians': anger at earthquake response grows in Venezuela
picks.summary: Public fury is mounting over the Venezuelan government's handling of twin earthquakes that killed nearly 4,500 people, raising the threat of social unrest on top of fallout from a US military intervention. Nicolás Maduro's politician son was heckled while touring a half-destroyed social-housing project, with one grieving mother berating him on camera over the lack of disaster aid.
flags: Death toll and aid figures are still emerging

picks.bucket: US as the world sees it
picks.title: In the aftermath of deadly shootings, ICE pauses most traffic stops
picks.summary: US Immigration and Customs Enforcement will suspend most non-urgent vehicle stops after two deadly shootings in under a week, according to Maine Sen. Angus King's office. The pause follows fatal incidents in Maine and Florida in which officers shot drivers of moving vehicles, drawing sharp criticism and feeding an intensifying national debate over immigration enforcement tactics.

picks.title: Today's Top Headlines | Morning News | India-UK CETA | Iran-US War | 15/7/2026
picks.origTitle: Today's Top Headlines | Morning News | India-UK CETA | Iran-US War | 15/7/2026
picks.summary: The state broadcaster's morning bulletin leads on the India-UK CETA trade agreement and the ongoing Iran-US war, alongside domestic headlines. As with most DD News output, the framing emphasises government initiatives and official positions.
flags: State-media source — framing favours the government line

picks.title: 'ये लड़ाई चुनी हुई सरकार की जवाबदेही के लिए है': सोनम वांगचुक के समर्थन में कौन-कौन सेलिब्रिटी आया
picks.origTitle: 'ये लड़ाई चुनी हुई सरकार की जवाबदेही के लिए है': सोनम वांगचुक के समर्थन में कौन-कौन सेलिब्रिटी आया
picks.summary: Environmental activist Sonam Wangchuk is on hunger strike at Delhi's Jantar Mantar demanding the resignation of minister Dharmendra Pradhan, and several film-industry figures have come out in support. Wangchuk frames the protest as a fight for the accountability of the elected government — a story of civic dissent that state outlets largely ignore.
flags: Independent framing of a protest state media downplays

picks.title: 伊朗：只要美国袭击继续，该地区就不会出口“一滴石油”和天然气
picks.origTitle: 伊朗：只要美国袭击继续，该地区就不会出口“一滴石油”和天然气
picks.summary: China's state news agency amplifies a declaration from Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps that, as long as US attacks continue, the region will not export 'a single drop' of oil or gas. The prominent, uncritical relay of Tehran's threat reflects Beijing's tilt toward Iran's narrative in the conflict.
flags: State media amplifying Iran's official messaging

picks.title: Бойцы "Севера" за ночь уничтожили четыре огневые группы ВСУ
picks.origTitle: Бойцы "Севера" за ночь уничтожили четыре огневые группы ВСУ
picks.summary: The state agency reports that Russia's 'North' grouping destroyed four Ukrainian fire teams overnight — a routine battlefield-success dispatch sourced to the Russian military. Such claims are issued daily and presented without independent confirmation.

picks.title: «У Китая хорошие шансы превратить Россию в гигантский Пакистан»
picks.origTitle: «У Китая хорошие шансы превратить Россию в гигантский Пакистан». The Wall Street Journal объясняет, как устроено партнерство России и Китая
picks.summary: Meduza retells a Wall Street Journal analysis arguing that four-plus years of war and isolation have tilted the Russia-China relationship decisively toward Beijing, turning Putin from a figure Xi once admired into a junior partner and supplicant. Both sides project a durable equal alliance, but the piece stresses the partnership's weak foundations and the many latent grounds for friction.

picks.title: 皇族数の確保に向けた皇室典範改正案 参議院で審議入り
picks.origTitle: 皇族数の確保に向けた皇室典範改正案 参議院で審議入り
picks.summary: A bill to shore up the shrinking number of Imperial Family members entered deliberation in the upper house. Chief Cabinet Secretary Kihara explained a provision allowing male-line descendants of former imperial branches to be adopted into the family, stressing it would not bring in people unrelated by blood and would rest on the free will of both adoptee and adoptive parents.

picks.title: 皇位の男系継承は「2600年以上の伝統」か　識者が与党幹部に異論
picks.origTitle: 皇位の男系継承は「2600年以上の伝統」か　識者が与党幹部に異論
picks.summary: As the ruling party advances its imperial-succession bill, experts push back on the leadership's claim that unbroken male-line succession is a tradition '2,600 years and more' old, disputing the historical basis for that framing. The piece offers an independent counterweight to the official narrative around the same reform NHK covers.

picks.title: Young People Want to Leave Vermont Over Affordability Concerns, Poll Finds
picks.summary: A new poll finds many young Vermonters want to leave the state over cost-of-living concerns, capturing the scale of Vermont's affordability crisis and the challenge it poses to an aging state trying to attract and keep younger residents.

picks.title: Contralora señala que el Prits opera sin plan estratégico y con fallas administrativas
picks.origTitle: Contralora señala que el Prits opera sin plan estratégico y con fallas administrativas
picks.summary: Puerto Rico's comptroller reports that PRITS — the island's information technology and innovation service — has been operating without a strategic plan and with administrative failures, and faults it for weak oversight of agencies' cybersecurity plans. The audit adds to accountability concerns over how the government manages its digital infrastructure.

picks.title: Microsoft's Secure Boot has been broken for a decade and no one noticed until now
picks.summary: Researchers found that old, forgotten 'shims' Microsoft never revoked make Secure Boot bypasses trivial — meaning a foundational PC boot-security feature has effectively been defeatable for most of its existence. The disclosure raises the prospect of stealthy bootkit-style attacks until the stale certificates are cleaned up.
flags: Security disclosure — bypass reported as simple

picks.title: Lawsuit claims Meta's layoff decisions were made by AI, not humans
picks.summary: A group of 26 former Meta employees is suing, alleging the company used a 'constellation' of internal AI tools rather than human judgment to decide who to cut — disproportionately targeting workers on medical or disability leave. Meta denies using AI to terminate workers with disabilities and medical problems.
flags: Allegation in a lawsuit; Meta denies it

picks.title: New York bans data center construction for a year, rattling AI industry
picks.summary: New York became the first US state to impose a one-year moratorium on new data-center construction, unsettling an AI industry racing to expand compute capacity. Backers frame it as a blueprint for a broader anti-data-center movement over energy, water, and community-impact concerns.

picks.title: Crunchyroll Store to Become Exclusive to Mega/Ultimate Fan Tiers in August
picks.summary: Starting in August, the Crunchyroll Store will be limited to Mega and Ultimate Fan subscription tiers, though existing open orders — including items released after the transition — will still be processed. The change effectively puts merch access behind the pricier membership levels.

picks.title: The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten Anime Gets English Dub
picks.summary: All 12 episodes of the popular rom-com 'The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten' are getting an English dub, launching Wednesday, as Crunchyroll also adds more series to its manga catalog.

picks.title: Tuesdays with Stories #664 — Hoofenmouth
picks.summary: New episode: Joe flubs a framing mission, and Mark races to make Ari Shaffir's going-away party before Shaffir moves to the UK. The usual loose, riff-heavy Tuesday.
